listing_name: Quiet Lake House with Private Room and Bath
description:
The house is full of interesting, eclectic art. Every room is surrounded by nature with big windows looking out on the trees and lake. The room is quiet and private with common areas open for you to use and enjoy. A large deck overlooks the lake and gardens. The house is very accessible to nature parks, shopping and downtown areas of Raleigh and Durham.

The space
Large, peaceful and conveniently located house with a retreat like atmosphere. Beautiful walking neighborhood near downtown Raleigh (10 miles) and 2 miles from 540 that takes you to Durham and Chapel Hill. The house is all on one level surrounded by large trees with the backyard and deck overlooking a beautiful lake. I am a certified massage therapist and bodywork practitioner and I have a treatment room on site if you would like to pamper yourself.
The available bedroom is the master suite with lots of floor space. There is a very comfortable king size Tempur-Pedic mattress in the room, a twin bed, walk-in closet with dresser, T.V., desk and a private bath with shower. Wi-fi is available throughout the house and you are welcome to use the kitchen, laundry and living rooms. Help yourself to tea, coffee and breakfast foods when you like.
There is a gym and yoga studio within walking distance with very reasonable rates. Additionally, a YMCA is located less then a 10 minute drive away. There are many close by restaurants and bars and I love to give recommendations! Popular shopping areas including, Southpoint, Crabtree Valley Mall and Brier Creek are located 5-15 minutes away by car. If you like to hike Umstead Park is 5-10 minutes away.

Guest access
A great walkable neighborhood. There is parking spot available in the driveway.

listing_name: Biz Traveler's Historic Haven- Downtown Raleigh
description:
We are a quirky find in a location considered both downtown Raleigh & historic Oakwood. When airbnb guests aren't here, the house is collaborative space for creatives. During your stay, the house is all yours. Pls read our entire listing to understand our layout & house rules to ensure you know what to expect for a super duper stay from the jump!

2 connected bedrooms! One has a queen bed (you walk through this room to the bathroom) & the other has a daybed with trundle (2 twins). Pls see pics!

The space
The Clairemont House is located in downtown Raleigh in the historic Oakwood neighborhood. It doubles as drop-in office space when not in use by airbnb guests. This makes it ideal for business travelers who wish to work at a desk (we have several!) and use our wifi and printer. Airbnb guests have the privacy and comfort of the entire home during their stay . Built in 1910, it has a wrap-around porch, hardwood floors, high ceilings and charming architectural details. There is also a back deck.

Our Guest Suite/sleeping area is on the second floor. You first enter the bedroom with the day bed that has a trundle -- this is the two twin mattresses. Continue through that room to the bedroom that has a queen bed, and you also access the bathroom through this room. There is no TV upstairs.

We welcome our guests to enjoy the use of our kitchen and laundry room. We also have a TV room downstairs with Apple TV, a sofa and two chairs. There are also two half bathrooms downstairs. Some of the furniture in the pics might be different -- we've been hosting for 10 years! Things get broken, and we replace!

Most guests consider us within walking distance of downtown offices, restaurants, retail and entertainment venues, making our location is ideal for the traveler who wants something that is NOT the traditional hotel stay. We are not a hotel but offer the quirkiness longtime airbnb travelers can appreciate. You might notice that some of our space looks like an office since we do office here during the week when we do not have airbnb guests. You will have privacy during your stay, and we are available if you need anything.

While we are just a few blocks from the hub of evening dining and entertainment in Raleigh, The Clairemont House is typically quiet after dark, with some of our immediate neighbors being businesses. Occasionally you will hear a firetruck from the nearby fire station.

The Clairemont House is about a 20-minute drive from RDU airport. While many things are within walking distance, if you plan to travel to other areas of the Triangle, the main terminal bus station is a few blocks away, or you can catch a taxi in downtown Raleigh.

Guest access
We have recently made changes so that our guests can enjoy the privacy of the entire house. We still use part of the house as office space, but we ONLY meet at times that we do not have an airbnb reservation. Our back deck and front porch are available to our guests. We have an iron and a mini-ironing board as well as a hair dryer. Our driveway is open for our guests. Paying guests in the house only, please. We do not allow guests of guests, photography sessions, parties or events unless you have contacted us about venue rental. Please see our House Rules for more info.

Other things to note
We aren't always able to accommodate early checkins or late checkouts, but please feel free to ask if your travel plans dictate the need for either.

We security cameras to view the outdoor surroundings around the house. If you feel that these are an invasion of your privacy, we are happy to tell you how to disconnect them during your stay.

Guest access

Pets: Aren't allowed for guests. But I have a small poodle, and his dog friends sometimes sleep over. FYI for those who might be extremely allergic.

NATURE NOTE:

listing_name: Lovely Long Lake Getaway/1st Floor King Bed Master
description:
Our 2500 Sq.ft. house is very cozy and comfortable. It is well appointed and has everything you will need for a night/week or month. We have a gourmet kitchen, jacuzzi tub in master, access to pool/tennis. Quiet and friendly neighborhood with nearby shopping, eating and entertainment. It is located half way between downtown Raleigh and downtown Durham, very close to RDU airport, RTP and major highways. It is also very convenient to NCSU, UNC and DUKE.

The space
Our home will make you feel warm and welcome. We have included many personal touches to make your stay comfortable and relaxing. You will find a very open floor plan with a well equipped gourmet kitchen. The dining table comfortably seats 8, great for playing cards or board games. listing_name: Big Amazing Pristine Home on 1.6 Acre with Gate
description:
Welcome to our stately & pristine 3200SF home on landscaped & flat 1.65 acre lot. This home offers guests ideal blend of comfort, modern living, privacy & tranquility yet is close to all local amenities. Minutes from great restaurants, shopping & nature, RDU Airport, downtown, Duke, UNC & NC State. House has 3 large bedrooms with king, queen, 2 twin beds & crib, office with desk and sofa bed, living & great rooms with leather sofas & sectional, 5 smart TVs, fireplace, screened porch & deck

The space
Mini baby crib is in the house (please see pictures). Early check in or late check out options possible if we don’t have same day turnover.

Carolina blue at its best!!!!! Imagine vacationing (or working) in this pristine & beautiful 3,200 square feet home. The entire 3,200 square feet are on one floor, which means no stair to climb once inside the house. House has gas fireplace in the Great room and a wheelchair friendly ramp from the garage to the house. Trained pets (up to 2) are accepted.

This amazing house was built in 2004 with bricks on all 4 sides of the exterior walls and premium appliances, including Dacor gas range, oven, microwave and Bosch refrigerator and dishwasher. The entire house was recently repainted with Sherwin-Williams Superpaint. There are extra large and long windows throughout the whole house, so the whole place is filled with natural lights. The house features sparkling clean hardwood floor and tile floor. This property sits on 1.65 acre flat lot and has a nicely landscaped yard with a front fence and metal gate. Guests can close the gate with a remote control once inside the house.

Once you open the front door, you'll be impressed by the 8 round columns and the massive gorgeous painting on the ceiling in the center of the house. You'll notice the entire house has 10 feet or higher ceiling. The living room has a sofa and love seat, a 65 inch Samsung 4k smart TV that steams Youtube TV live or watch 100+ family friendly DVD movies, and Sony CD player that's connected to crystal clear homemade speakers. If you like classical music, you are in luck!

The great room has supple leather sectional, gas fire place, and a 50 inch Samsung smart TV that can stream Youtube TV live.

The kitchen has granite countertops and maple cabinets. It is equipped with various cookware, a blender, a rice cooker, plates, bowls, silverware, glasses, cups. In other words, you'll have no problem cooking up a feast if you like to cook. The formal dining room has fine China in the cabinet.

Be blown away by the Master bedroom suite when you open the french doors. The massive room features a kind size bed with medium firm memory form mattress, extra pillows, white sheet, white duvet covering white comforters. The master bathroom has 72 inch granite countertop over the dual vanities, oversized shower room, a jetted tub, and toilet room. The master closet has a lot of shelf space, iron board and iron. You can relax in the reclining leather chair and enjoy the Youtube TV on the 50 inch Vizio smart TV.

The guest bedroom suite features a queen bed and firm mattress, a full bathroom, and a 50 inch Samsung HDTV with Amazon Fire TV Stick, which converts it into a smart TV and can stream Youtube TV. The third bedroom has 2 twin mattresses, a 50 inch Panasonic HD TV with Amazon Fire TV Stick which converts into a smart TV and can stream Youtube TV. It has a kids' 3-in-1 game table: air hockey, foosball and pool table.

The office has a work desk, chair, and a power strip if you ever feel the itch to work. The sofa bed in the office can be converted to a bed easily. You can get extra pillows, sheets and comforters in either master or guest bedroom.

Relax in the screen porch or the huge deck, which has two lounge chairs, a metal table and 4 chairs. Enjoy the sunset while overlooking huge yard from the deck.

The house is in a quiet neighborhood and you will occasionally see deers in the yard. These animals are harmless and will run away once they see people approaching. Despite its peaceful surrounding, the house is very convenient to all the local amenities. It's 15-30 minutes from the RDU International Airport, downtown Raleigh, Research Triangle Park, Duke University & Garden, UNC, NC State University, Duke University Hospital & Wake Med, and many outdoor recreation. Please go ahead and make our home your home away from home and make great memories.

IMPORTANT: Please note that a short term stay in my house for 28 days or more days will result in signing of a Vacation Lease Contract as it is required by the North Carolina State Law in Chapter 42A, The Vacation Rental Act.

Thank you very much!

Guest access
The house front door is equipped with Eufy Smart Lock. I will issue guests a personal access code for the smart lock before arrival and the code will expire after checking out. Guests have access to the entire house and the garage during the stay. The house has an attic/second floor, but the attic space is completely unfinished and so it's not accessible to guests. The crawl space is not accessible to guests either.

Other things to note
All three bedrooms have ceiling fans.
The great room and screen porch also have ceiling fans.
All 3 bedrooms have USB and USB-C connections.
The entire house has energy efficient LED lights, including two smart LED lights in the front porch.

listing_name: Adorable 1BR studio in Five Points
description:
This is one half of a renovated 1940's era duplex is located in Raleigh's historic Five Points neighborhood. You have private access to the entire top floor, set up in a studio apartment style. Just on the edge of downtown, this mixed commercial area retains a neighborhood feel and is walkable distance to local restaurants and breweries. A cozy home away from home or temporary work space that allows you to easily experience all that the City of Oaks has to offer!

The space
Granite counter tops and a full size fridge make this furnished apartment ideal for a short stay or long term lease. Queen size bed and a custom tile shower allow you to have the comforts of home while you travel. Linens and necessities provided. Plenty of off street parking behind the house which insures your car has a guaranteed place to stay too!

Guest access

Since there are folks who live downstairs please be mindful that noise travels and everyone appreciates good neighbors.

listing_name: Comfortable Cameron Village Condominium
description:
Located in walkable (92 walk score) Historic Cameron/Village District (formerlyCameronVillage),you will find this one bedroom condo close to downtown, Raleigh Convention Center, all 5 universities, all free State Museums, the PNC Arena. RDU International Airport is a mere 20 min away. Cameron Village has over 100 shops, including 2 groceries, gym, restaurants! Fresh Market and Starbucks are are a meet 5 minute walk.
Walk to YMCA & NCSU.
Uber/Lyft and public transport readily available.

The space
SUPERIOR location in the heart of Raleigh, this updated cozy one bedroom condo is a 5 minute walk from historic Cameron Village. Guests have full access to their residence. The space is not shared.

We offer 24 hour self check-in with an entry keypad. Respecting your privacy, we do not hover....but are available to assist you as needed.

With over 100 stores and restaurants (including a 24 hour Harris-Teeter and Fresh Market grocers within two blocks,our location is in a tree lined courtyard on a quiet residential street......walkable, urban and yet serene. Dine at a variety of restaurants, such as Cantina 18, Piccolo Italia, Tupelo Honey, Chop'd and many many, more. Grab a cup of coffee at Starbucks or Benelux Coffee Shop. Shop in fashionable boutiques or for outdoor gear at Great Outdoor Provision Company. Eat frozen treats at Goodberry's Frozen Custard. RISE is well known for their doughnuts and biscuits.

Less than 8 blocks from NC State University. Less than 10 minute drive to .....Downtown Raleigh, Raleigh Convention Center, PNC Arena, all state museums, (including the NC Museum of Art), NC State Fairgrounds ( year round weekend flea market) , Dorton Arena, and the NCSU Arboretum. RDU International Airport (11 miles/20 minutes).

The condo is located on the second floor of a two story building facing a tree lined courtyard. Featuring an European style kitchen complete with refrigerator, range, microwave, toaster, dishwasher and Keurig coffee maker. You can pack less with the washer and dryer in the unit ( Laundry supplies are provided). The bed is KING SIZED and ultra comfortable. The living room features TV, Roku with Netflix, and wireless internet.

This location puts you near the center of Raleigh's urban landscape, but in a restful, quiet neighborhood with tree-lined courtyards. Cameron Village is the ideal basecamp for all your Raleigh adventures!

Our 5 year consecutive “Super Host” 5 star rating reflects our commitment to exceeding your expectations! We will be honored to host your visit.

listing_name: Peaceful Getaway-private master suite, pool, pond
description:
Enjoy spacious private guestroom with a king-size bed, daybed with trundle, and optional twin air mattress. Your room includes a private bath, Smart TV, WiFi, mini-fridge, and microwave.
A second room (double bed / private bath) may be available for an extra $30/night—just ask!
Our home is in a rural community with fishing pond, abundant wildlife. The pool is open seasonally. Smoking is allowed outdoors.
We’ve hosted guests for years—especially international travelers—and love being Superhosts!

The space
Our home is nestled in a peaceful rural community, surrounded by nature. Take in the beauty of our fishing pond, abundant wildlife, and quiet country roads—perfect for walking, running, or biking. If you visit between April and October, you can enjoy our pool!

Guests are welcome to use the kitchen or store their favorite snacks in the fridge. We offer a light breakfast each morning, and there’s always plenty of coffee to start your day. One of the best spots to unwind is the side porch, where you can enjoy breakfast with a view or feed the fish at the dock.

Animal lovers will feel right at home! We have several friendly cats, a horse, and frequent visits from birds and wildlife. If you like cats, you'll love Tasha!

I am a wedding officiant and frequently have small weddings at my home. Always something fun happening at our home!

Guest access
You will have your own large private bedroom and bath. There is a Smart TV and microwave in your room and small refrigerator in the hall. The kitchen is available for minimal cooking. There is also a sunny side porch that is a great place for breakfast in the morning or to wind down with a glass of wine in the evening. Feel free to take a quiet walk in the woods. As weather permits, the pool is also available.

During your stay
My husband and I live here as well, and we love to share our home. Join us for a light breakfast in the morning.
You are welcome to use the kitchen or living room or enjoy the grounds outside. We would be happy to recommend local restaurants or nearby activities that you can visit in the area. And we always enjoy a fun game of cards or a board game if you are up for it!

Other things to note
We can accommodate more visitors. We have a second bedroom with a double bed. Cost is an extra $30/night and an extra $7/person. Please contact me about your situation.

listing_name: Private, Desirable, Convenient North Raleigh Home!
description:
This contemporary style home is located in a peaceful neighborhood in the heart of Midtown North Raleigh. It's minutes from restaurants, coffee shops, grocery stores, shopping, walking trails, tennis courts, parks and is only 6 miles from downtown and 1.5 miles from North Hills!

It is both work and family friendly including wireless fiber-optic high-speed internet; Central Air; SMART TV in living room and in the first floor bedroom; and Keyless Entry. Washer and dryer are included.

The space
In addition to its convenient location, the bright and open layout is perfect for enjoying one another's company. A fully equipped kitchen, large deck with built-in seating, private fenced-in yard, separate laundry room with washer and dryer, closets in every room with shelving and a driveway for parking 2 cars along with free on-street parking make this home a relaxing and easy choice for your work or family stay in Raleigh.

This is a multi-level home. Upon entry, there are 4 steps down to the right leading to the kitchen/living area. There is one step up to the Master Bedroom & Bath. The 2nd & 3rd bedroom are located on the second floor along with the 2nd full bathroom.

The Master bedroom has a King size bed. The two upstairs bedrooms have Queen size beds. There is also a full size futon in the larger upstairs bedroom. The living room has a large comfortable couch and can accommodate a person for sleeping. The stairs are the only carpeted area in the home.

This private home will not be shared with anyone other than those in your party. The co-host lives nearby should you need help.

Raleigh City License #ZSTR-000185-2022

description:

listing_name: Mid-Century Retreat | NCSU • Lenovo • Rex Hospital
description:
Our home is located in the lovely Ridgewood neighborhood. Make yourself at home, enjoy a Nespresso coffee out on the screened in porch. Our yard is fully fenced which is great for kids and/or pets. 1000mbps WiFi & workspace. TV w/ Netflix/Disney/HBO/Prime.

A quick walk gets you to Whole Foods/Walgreens/Coffee/Tacos. Minutes driving to the heart of downtown Raleigh, Hillsborough street, NCSU, Meredith College, PNC arena, the NC State Fairgrounds, the NC Museum of Art, RDU, Rex hospital.

The space
Our house is fully furnished with guest access to 2 bedrooms (1 with full size bed, sleeps 2), (1 bedroom with twin bed and trundle bed, sleeps 2), 1 bathroom, kitchen, dining room, front room (can be set up as additional bedroom w/queen size air mattress), living room, fenced in front and back yard, screened in porch. If you need use of a crib, we can provide a pack n play which can be setup for young infants or toddlers, just let us know ahead of time. We also have a high chair. If you are in need of other baby/kid gear such as a stroller, baby gate, etc, let us know and we can bring it over.

Our home can be rented with additional access to the master suite (1 queen bed and bathroom with walk-in shower) for an additional fee of $100 for the first night and $50/subsequent night.

This is a private home, so there are personal items throughout the space. We have a toddler and a baby so our house is well suited for families. Your children are welcome to play with the toys at the house as long as they put them back. :)

Please note that we are a pet friendly space and we have a dog ourselves. While we do our best to minimize pet fur with our cleaning process, it is possible that you may still come across some pet fur, so please consider that if you have allergies.

Guest access
Our primary guest bedroom can accommodate two people and is equipped with a full sized bed. The second bedroom has a twin size bed and additional trundle bed (please let us know ahead of time if you need this). If you are traveling with a slightly larger party, we can setup a queen size, bed height air mattress in our front living room, which has privacy doors. You will have full access to kitchen/living room/front room/2 bedrooms/1 bathroom/dining room/screened in porch/front and backyard.

We are pet friendly and the pet fee covers one pet. We have a large dog crate setup that you may use. If you are traveling with more than one pet, please let us know in your booking request.

Other things to note
There are times when we may need to access to the detached garage during your stay, but we will always let guests know before we come on the property to access the garage.

listing_name:
The Rustic Loft
 King Bd Nature Views
description:
Welcome to the Rustic loft.
This property offers a stunning 1200 sq ft covered deck designed to merge the indoors with the outdoors seamlessly. The deck features a glass garage door that can be opened to let in the breeze & natural light allowing guests to enjoy the picturesque views of the pond.
Inside you'll find a well-appointed one-bedroom space offering a peaceful retreat, & the living area provides a cozy spot to relax after a day of enjoying all that Raleigh has to offer.
Pet fee $100.

The space
The Rustic Loft is an apartment built over our home's garage with a 1200 square foot deck built to enjoy the views and provide parking underneath. This is attached to our home (we and our pups live here), however you have your own separate entrance, your own parking and your own view of the pond. You also have access to a large side yard for your pets. If bringing a pet add the $100 fee when booking.


Our home is professionally treated for pests on a regular schedule. Because we’re located in a beautiful wooded area of Raleigh, it's possible you may see the occasional bug inside, especially right after a treatment. This is completely normal and usually means the spray is working!

If you prefer that the home not be sprayed shortly before your stay, just let us know in advance and we’ll do our best to accommodate.

Thank you for your understanding, and we hope you enjoy your stay at the Rustic Loft!

Guest access
The Rustic Loft is built over our garage with a separate private entrance.
It feels very secluded and quiet according to many of our reviews even though we are so close to shopping and restaurants. You will have your own private parking under the deck or along the fenced area if you prefer.

Other things to note
The loft also has a generator, so if your home is out of power and you need a place to stay, this place will always have power!

listing_name: Relaxing Raleigh Retreat w/HEATED POOL & Hot tub
description:
This home has it all, beautifully decorated, loaded with amenities & Southern charm. Every room is so inviting and comfortable. The home is surrounded by green lawns, trees & flowers. The outdoor space is as lovely as the indoor space. A heated saltwater pool open Mar-Nov, 5 person hot tub, screened porch & fire pit that can be enjoyed in any season. Beautiful outdoor lighting & plenty of space to play an assortment of yard games. This place is amazing, and we would love to share it with you.

The space
The property is 7 miles from the airport and conveniently located half way between Downtown Raleigh (11 miles) and Downtown Durham (11 miles). Which makes it close to many popular destinations that most of our guests are coming to the area for. That means NC State, Duke, UNC, RDU, RTP are all close by. Most popular places can be reached in 20 minutes.

This 1881 sq. ft. of living space, totally updated ranch house has been freshly painted, new hardwoods throughout and new plush carpet in the bedrooms. Beautifully decorated with new modern furnishings. The kitchen equipped to make a snack or full on Thanksgiving dinner. The kitchen also has a breakfast nook with room for 7 at the unique poplar slab table. Brand new front load washer and dryer are located in the laundry closet in the kitchen. There is a separate dining area off the kitchen with seating for 8. The den has a vaulted ceiling with plenty of room for everyone to gather in front of the gas log fire place and watch tv or a movie on the new 55” Samsung TV. Pull up the bean bag chairs and play a video game on the Xbox one. Maybe grab one of the boardgames or puzzles if you are trying to unplug with the family. If you are looking to getting away from all the goings on in the den, then step around into the quiet living room with 2 oversized chairs that you can curl up in and read a book or fold out and spend the night on. The living room also has a desk and printer/scanner if you need to get a little work done. With wireless high speed gigabit internet everyone can be online with no problems. Down the hall, the 3 bedrooms each have a brand new plush mattress bed, room darkening shades, USB plug-ins on each side of the bed, sound machine, 32” ROKU internet/cable TV and ceiling fan. The master bedroom has a king bed and on-suite bathroom with a walk-in shower. The second bedroom has a california-king bed and the third bedroom has a queen bed. These two bedrooms share a full bathroom across the hall.

Don’t let a rainy day stop you from getting outside, from the den step outside onto the 150 + square foot screened-in porch with a big overhead fan, 2 large motion chairs, 2 hammock chairs, sun shades and a bistro set. Watch the birds and listen to the running water of a bubbling fountain. The outside (3/4 acre) has extensive gardens with fruit trees, berry bushes, fenced backyard and lots of relaxing outdoor seating. There is a fire pit with 6 Adirondack chairs with plenty of room for outdoor games, which includes Corn Hole, Giant Jenga, Badminton, with LED birdies for night games, Bocce Ball and of course Croquet. We have also installed wonderful backyard landscape lighting. A large outdoor dinning table with an umbrella to enjoy an outdoor barbecue.

The new heated in-ground saltwater pool is open for your enjoyment Mid-March through November and closed December to Mid-March. The fenced pool will be separate from the fenced backyard, so our visiting families with small children can enjoy the backyard without the worry of the pool. The pool measures 14 ft. x 30 ft. with a maximum depth of 5.5 ft. A large sunshelf on one end. The 1000 sq. ft. patio around the secured pool area has 4 adjustable lounge chairs, 2 chairs, (2) 9ft. umbrellas, 4 floating chairs and other pool toys all to make sure you have a most enjoyable and relaxing experience at our new saltwater-heated pool.

There is a two car garage with plenty of room even for the big cars and the driveway has ample parking.

We do allow no more than 2 dogs up to 60 lbs. (dogs only! NO CATS!) There is a $150 fee. You must add them to your reservation. They must have a current rabies vaccination. They must be crate trained and well behaved. We provide a very large crate with bedding, dog bowls, waterproof dog blankets for them to lay on and a \soggy dog\" towel for drying wet paws. They are not allowed on beds. Your fur baby must be freshly groomed and nails trimmed within a week prior to entering the house. They must not be left alone in the house

listing_name: Near the Center of it All
description:
Our place is near the center of practically everything: family-friendly activities, nightlife, public transportation, parks, and museums. You’ll love our place because of the proximity to downtown. Our place is good for most people. A good size room that is Bright and Airy with new triple window and blackout drapes. We live on the property and are available as needed. Our private space is in the rear of the house.

The space
Private room in our home with private, exclusive-to-you bathroom across the hall. We have sectioned this space off from the living room to make it even more private for you. You can totally walk back and forth in your undies and no one would know it!

The room has hardwood floors and a cozy queen size bed with 100% cotton linens. Custom closet with shelves and hanging space behind the custom barn door. Hisense smart TV and blackout drapes finish out this home away from home.

In the hall to the bath is a mini fridge, microwave, electric kettle and coffee maker, including filters and coffee, or bring your own. I get the coffee directly from the grower in Puerto Rico. It’s the best coffee I’ve ever had. I also offer bags for sale.

Our house was built in the 1950's, but in case it matters, we have made several improvements in the last 11 years. The kitchen and bathrooms were all renovated. In your bath you will find more recent upgrades of a new tub and shower tile.

In the bath you will find 100% cotton towels. We provide bath towels, hand towel, washcloths in addition to washcloths for makeup. Shampoo, conditioner and body wash are provided In case you forget any of your own. There is a small storage cart for your personal toiletries and room in the medicine cabinet behind the mirror as well.

Guest access
Front of the house has a nice living room for reading or watching TV. If we are in there you are always welcome to join us. We have had some great conversations with our guests there. It is separated from the kitchen with a set of wood doors so don't worry about leaving early, coming back late or watching tv. We likely won't hear you.

During your stay
We can be available as you want us to be. We have 9 kids between us, all out of the nest. Yay!!!!!!! We have lived in the area for over 30 years. We can tell you anything you want to know about Raleigh and the surrounding area. We love to travel ourselves and always choose Airbnb when possible. We have hosted people from 14 different countries and love discovering things we have in common.

Other things to note
Check in and check out can be flexible depending on whether we have another guest arriving/departing. Check-in is typically between 3 PM and 10 PM. We have an access code for the front door to accommodate late arrivals. Checkout is typically 11 AM.

SPECIAL NOTE: On rare occasions we may have a family member from out of town visit when we already have an Airbnb guest coming. In this instance our family member stays in the spare room next to the Airbnb room, but
they use our bathroom. We feel it’s better to do this than cancel a reservation. Let me reiterate this is very rare. It’s happened two-three times in three years. Even so, we felt it important enough to mention it.

Cozy bedroom in downtown Raleigh's historic Glenwood Brooklyn neighborhood offers a short walk to Five Points, Glenwood South, &Village District. Neighborhood is quiet & family-friendly. Tom and Kelly, and an occasional visiting granddog live in this charming bungalow built in 1929.

Museums, the Convention Center, & Union Station are all within 2 miles & on a free, public bus route. Room is ideal for business travelers, singles, or couples visiting the city.

The space
Our home is clean, quiet, welcoming, and just a short walk to trendy bars, restaurants, and shopping.

Other things to note
River is our beloved, ten-year-old granddog. He's sweet, friendly, and very quiet. He may bark to say hello the first time he meets you, but after that, you won't hear a peep from him.

listing_name: Lil’ Tiny house in private backyard!
description:
Private lil’ tiny house in the backyard of an residence on a modest residential street just ~10 mins. south of downtown Raleigh, NC! The space is best for one person (short & long term) or couples (short term), 2 humans, max. Tiny fun! The space was a construction site trailer. It’s modest. The neighborhood is too; mostly working/middle class families and tenants. Think cozy glamping with plumbing, privacy and wifi. This is NOT the Hilton. It’s priced accordingly. Long lease inquiries welcome!

The space
Wanna try the tiny house life? Come stay in just ~220 square feet, just 10-15 minutes south of Downtown Raleigh!

This house is a tiny house made from a retired construction site trailer. It offers privacy and one level tiny living (so no shimmying down a ladder in the dark when you have to pee in the middle of the night!).

This space is modest. The neighborhood is too. If you have champagne tastes, this is more Miller Lite. Please do not trash us in reviews because you did not read this entire listing, and you expected something far different.

There’s a deck on which you can chill and admire the large lush backyard that features a lemon, magnolia, pecan, black walnut, oak and dogwood tree. It’s best to pack some bug spray during warmer months. The mosquitoes here are bad. Repeat: The mosquitoes are BAD.

Also, like all of the south, Water bugs, ants, ladybugs and other critters are quite common. The entire property is treated semi-annually to deter insects. Your help with this is appreciated: clean counters, store any food in airtight containers, take out the garbage regularly, keep doors and windows closed and wipe or vacuum any spills.

*There is only one sink.

Repeat: there is only one sink. It is in the kitchen.

*Flushing toilet (no compost; no incinerator), tiny bathtub/shower combo.

*Kitchenette with dorm fridge & microwave, toaster oven, coffee pot and a hot plate. (There is NOT a full kitchen; no stove, no oven.)

*There is no TV.

**Repeat after me: There is no TV.

(Bring your tablet or laptop, go to the Alamo Draft House for a movie, etc.)

Property owner is not responsible for any accidents, injuries or illness that may occur while on the premises or its facilities. Owner is not responsible for the loss of personal belongings or valuables of any guest. By accepting this reservation, it is agreed that all guests are expressly assuming the risk of any harm arising from their use of the premises or others whom they invite to the premise. Visitors besides those registered in the Airbnb reservation as guests are discouraged.

Guest access
Hang out in the back yard & enjoy the deck attached to the tiny house all you want!

Other things to note
There is a Bluetooth speaker available for your use.

A Keurig and a small drip coffee pot are provided.

There are a few plates, cups, coffee mugs and utensils, a bottle opener & wine tool, and that’s about it.

Guests provide their own food and drink. As the pictures show, there’s a dorm fridge and a microwave. There is no stove or oven, but I have a small toaster oven and an electric hot plate and a tea pot in one of the cabinets as well as a pot, pan and small skillet.

It’s super helpful if you wash the dishes you use. There’s a dish rack for your use. Cleaning products, a small hand broom and TP and Paper towels are provided. There’s a vacuum too. Please clean up after yourself.

If you forget some toiletries, I have a basket of the basics available along with clean towels in the “closet” in the bedroom.

There’s an iron and a small ironing board, some coat hooks and a few hangers.

There’s a small fan.

If you are sensitive to light noise, please bring an eye mask, earplugs, a white noise, machine, etc.

The HVAC makes noise because of course it does. Please be advised - you are going to hear the HVAC running.

Linens are washed at my home, by me. I have long hair and dogs and while I do my best to make sure our hairs don't travel, it is possible, they may. If you have severe allergies to animal fur, please be advised: it is probably best you find other housing.

WiFi is boosted to the tiny house from the brick house, but is shared, so bandwidth is subject to change.

listing_name: Charming Vintage Cottage Circa 1906.
description:
My 1906 little house is completely restored farmhouse that my great grandparents brought to our property during the depression. Our guest cottage is tucked away behind the main house where we live. It has original shiplap boards in the open living room and kitchenette with beautiful pine floors throughout the 700 square-foot house. There is a separate bedroom with 12 foot lofted ceilings and plenty of natural sunlight throughout. We know you will feel good the moment you walk through the door.

The space
When you stay in The Little House you have access to the entire house. You’ll open the French blue door to a beautifully restored 1906 farmhouse. The living room and kitchenette have great sunlight from the big windows in the living room and the antique Parisian window in the kitchen. It’s beautifully appointed with sofa, chairs and additional seating. It also has a fireplace(accent only) , dining room table, flat screen tv, bar cart and record player! There’s a back door to a cozy outdoor space, too that’s very private.

From there go down a short hall with closet on one side and opposite a modern bathroom with a large shower with a rain head and handheld shower. Not something a 1906 farmhouse normally comes with!

The master bedroom with vaulted ceiling is straight ahead with a large 4 poster bed and luxurious bedding. It also has a nice dressing table with a full length mirror. Four large windows give plenty of light all day.

Guest access
You have access to the entire Little House while you’re a guest. You also have access to the sun porch of the main house to store luggage before or after your check in/out. You may also enjoy my organic garden and chickens! You’ll feel like you’re on a farm in the heart of the city.

Other things to note
I take great pride in my home and my space. If something is amiss please don’t hesitate to text me and I will address it immediately. It’s important that all my guests are comfortable.
***

listing_name: Private room for work or peaceful getaway
description:
Our home is in a rural setting—quiet, safe and private! But it is not far from Downtown Raleigh, museums, RDU airport and Research Triangle Park.

The room had a double bed and optional twin mattress. Also a work desk and smart TV. Refrigerator and private bathroom across the hall.

Our home has Wifi, player piano, pool, fishing pond, lots of birds. And we have several friendly cats and a horse. Smoking outside. Kitchen is available.
We love being Superhosts and look forward to meeting you!

The space
Make yourself at home. You can use the kitchen or just store goodies in the refrigerator. Feel free to swim in the warmer weather. Ask us about our player piano. Your favorite spot may be having breakfast on the side porch, or feeding the fish at the end of the dock. There are low traffic roads nearby if you like to walk or run or bike.
We have several friendly cats and a horse, and frequent wildlife in the yard, and plenty of birds year round!
If you like cats, you will love Tasha! Or offer a carrot or an apple, and make a friend with our horse, Bernie!
If you are wanting to be within walking distance of Starbucks and a local pub, you will not find that here. But within a 10-12 minute drive, you will find all that and much more!

I am a wedding officiant and frequently have small weddings at my home. Always something fun happening here!

Guest access
You will have your own private bedroom and a private bathroom across the hall. You are welcome to use the kitchen for cooking or watch TV in the living room. There is also a sunny side porch that is a great place for breakfast in the morning or to wind down with a glass of wine in the evening. As weather permits, the pool is also available.

During your stay
My husband and I live here as well, and we love to share our home. Join us for a light breakfast in the morning. You are welcome to use the kitchen or living room or enjoy the grounds outside. We would be happy to recommend local restaurants or nearby activities that you can visit in the area. And we always enjoy a game of cards or a board game of you are up for it!

Other things to note
We can accommodate more visitors. We have two bedrooms and we have extra space. Please contact me about your situation.

listing_name: Oakwood near downtown w' Nespresso, Bikes & Bidet.
description:
This is a 1-room studio in a very safe part of Raleigh, Oakwood which has some renown. We are also about 250 yards from the governors mansion, and there is little crime in this area. We also have many amenities that are close by, including 2-restaurants that are run by a 5-star chef. We also have the Burning Coal theater directly across the street from us. They seem to have plays and various events happening three or four times a month. People say it's some of the best local theater in the State

The space
This Studio apartment is on the 1st floor of our townhouse close to downtown Raleigh and looks out onto a manicured park. Colette and I love to travel and consequently the bedding set-up was at the top of our list, we got turned onto Comfy Earth bedding that offers a fiber based bamboo sleeping experience, second to none. The studio itself has a full kitchenette including a Nespresso, micro, fridge, toaster oven, hotplate, filtered water, Soda water and a Nespresso with fresh cream. We also have bikes/helmets so you can enjoy the North Person Street Corridor and downtown Raleigh which is less than a mile away. We are 2 blocks from the free R-LINE bus which cycles thru every 15 minutes from 7 am to 11 pm and takes you thru downtown Raleigh and back. The city also has Cisco bikes and Gotcha electric scooters scattered thru-out the city. You can pick up an Uber/Lyft in a short period of time and get downtown for around$5. This Oakwood area is in a unique part of the city having 5-bars a deli, 6-restaurants, a bakery, ice cream place, a bike shop and even a Krispy Kreme.

Due to Dog allergies we are unable to host any animals other than small hypo-allergenic type doggies. Due to Tom's severe dogs, we only accept hypo- allergy allergy dogs. We have cleared this restriction thru Airbnb. Our pet fee is $65.

We also have 2-other listing on Airbnb that you might be interested in that are shown on this Airbnb platform: it might also give you a wider range review experience on us:

https://www.airbnb.com/hosting/listings/editor/29157716/view-your-space

We also rent this entire house out occasionally if you need more room for your visit. In those cases, the entire house would be yours. Our entire house is listed on this Airbnb site as well or you could also search \Townhouse with a 2-car garage\" and you will find our other property. listing_name: Large Private Suite in Southern Gothic Mansion
description:
This private suite is situated in the upper floor of a grand home in Raleigh's lovely tree lined neighborhood of Hayes Barton. It has abundant natural light and privacy. There is a large veranda upon which to have your morning coffee or afternoon craft beer while sitting in the rocking chairs, surrounded by crepe myrtle trees. There is a private entrance leading to a central sitting room, flanked by a bath and two large bedrooms, each with a queen size bed and a porch. Quiet, not for parties.

The space
The rooms are bright and beautiful. You will have a private entrance that leads to a sitting room, bath and two bedrooms. Each bedroom has lovely natural light, and a porch. This suite is spacious clean and comfortable: a place that you can experience the relaxed pace of the Old South. Come see how the locals live.

Guest access
The suite has its own entrance, so you can come and go without disturbing anyone. It is softly lit at night so you can find your way. The drive is dark, however, and you should have a phone light handy.

Other things to note
Since the suite is on the second floor, you must be able to climb stairs. Because this is a quiet neighborhood, I don't host wedding events. Also no professional strobe flash photography, as it annoys my nice neighbor. I know you already would know this, but don’t smoke inside the house.

listing_name: Peaceful Hideaway: Clean & Quiet with Private Bath
description:
Relax and Enjoy your time away in an Elegant, 1st Floor Room w/ adjacent Private Bath. Centrally located: in Mid-Town/North Raleigh near Northridge Country Club & Ravenscroft. 10-15 minutes to downtown & 16 to RDU/airport

Beds: Set up as 2 Twin Beds or you can move them together as 1 Split King bed
Business Friendly: Access printers, scanners, WIFI, office supplies & Amazon Show
Excellent Location: Restaurants, Shopping, Hospitals & Test Center Nearby
Perfect for Executives & Vacationers alike!

The space
Relax in an elegant, first-floor, private room in a chic Midtown/North Raleigh (end unit) townhome located in a quiet country club neighborhood.

Whether you are here on business, house hunting, attending a wedding, concert or a show, visiting a loved one at Ravenscroft, taking a licensing exam at Prometric Testing Center, or simply checking out the local restaurant and nightlife scene, you will love chilling out in this quiet and ultra-comfy space.

Indulge in unrivaled comfort in this private space, which includes:

Beds: Two twin beds (the standard setup) that can be combined to form a split king bed, provided notice is given in advance (we need a reasonable amount of time to rearrange the furniture and change the linens to accommodate the king-size setup).

>Four-inch gel-infused memory foam padding and comfy linens complement your Sterns & Foster mattress.

Bathrooms: Two private bathrooms are available for use. One is directly adjacent to (immediately outside) your bedroom door. The second bathroom is located upstairs, just inside the room on the right at the top of the stairs. The second bathroom is available in case you need multiple flushes in a short period, as the first-floor toilet may (temporarily) be refilling slowly. All other water pressure is strong. (We have a third full bathroom for our private use. You will not be sharing a bathroom with us.)

CHECK-IN & Check-Out

> Check-in is at 4:00 pm (EST). Earlier check-in requests cannot be accommodated at this time; however, earlier bag drop is happily accommodated, so please plan accordingly.
- >There is a smart lock on the door; however, we will try to be there to greet you whenever possible. We will send instructions on how to access the smart lock. (A cloud cam records all smart lock and entryway activity.)

Check-out is at 11:00 a.m. (EST).


CATS
> PLEASE DO NOT BOOK THIS PLACE IF:
-->you don't like cats,
-->you are scared of cats, or
-->you are allergic to cats.

We love our cats very much. We do not want to have to keep our kittiehhhhhs locked up (this is their home too). They are very playful and at least one of them (Ozzy - our social cat) will likely want to greet you when you arrive.

We run a Blueair Pro XL HEPA Silent Air Purifying System in the home 24/7. Although this mega-system is designed to help control allergens in the air, we cannot guarantee that all cat-related allergens will be completely removed. Therefore, if you are allergic to cats, we recommend that you do not book with us.


STAIRS
There are stairs on the property:

> Outside of the home: There are three steps at the front entrance (two from the sidewalk to the landing and one as you enter the front door). The back entrance is currently unavailable to guests.

>Inside the home, there is a staircase located within the house. However, your space is actually located on the first floor, so you won't need to go upstairs unless you require the use of the second private bathroom.


Please read the useful info under our House Rules below, including check-in and parking details.

Total stairs between the sidewalk and your room: 4. There are three leading up to the landing and then one in the doorway.

*** Peaceful Hideaway: 1st Floor Bedroom > Private Bath > Midtown/North Raleigh ***

Guest access
Your room will come with either a G**gle Home Mini or an Amazon Show as well as free Wi-Fi and a TV.

Access: foyer, hallway, your private room and private bath. A second private bath is available if you need it.

Although the kitchen is currently unavailable due to a floor remodel and repair (for your safety, we do not want you to trip), we may be able to accommodate reasonable kitchen-related requests.

Additionally,
> There is a microwave and a refrigerator located in your room.
> Dishes and silverware are available.

During your stay
COMMUNICATION
> Heads-up Window: Please let us know when you plan to arrive by providing 30-60 minute window of your expected arrival time is greatly appreciated (so that one of us are not just walking out of the shower when you come in or the cleaning lady can complete her work on a flexible schedule with no worries. :)

> If you have any questions or concerns, please let us know ASAP so that we may respond and address any issues that may arise. We do not anticipate any problems, however, we cannot fix anything that we are not aware of so please be sure to speak up.

> If you need to reach us, it is quite easy as at least one of us will usually be on the property during your stay and if not, you can certainly call or message us if you need anything.

>We are flexible when it comes to interacting with our guests. We are generally fairly hands-off as we know that privacy is important. Of course, we always enjoy making new friends so if you feel like hanging out or chatting, that's cool too.

Other things to note
Food:
Please bring your own food - coffee and tea bags are available.

>There are tons of restaurants around for sit-down, take-out, and some offer delivery.

*** Please be mindful of food, drinks, and other items, and ensure the microwave is left clean. ***

Food Delivery:
You may arrange to have food items delivered (via DoorDash, Uber Eats, Amazon, etc., NOT by mail) if you don’t feel like going out. However, we cannot be held responsible for any items that you have ordered or delivered to our address, regardless of the circumstances.


Extra Cleaning and Damage Fees:
If there are stains, damages or additional cleaning is required, we will be forced to charge a cleaning fee (which we do not charge in the discounted price of the room), or damage/replacement/repair fees (if applicable). *** We rarely have to charge for such things, and we would prefer to keep it that way. ; )


*** No items of any kind may be mailed to our address under any circumstances. ***

You may NOT use our address for anything other than what is listed above or as required by Airbnb policies.

You may NOT attach your name to our address in any form. Unfortunately, we have been forced to file mail fraud charges in the past and we do not want to go through the process again. However, we will if we are forced to do so.

You may NOT make a purchase using our Amazon account without permission and payment arrangements made in advance.

Also, please don't sign up for any subscriptions or free trials using our accounts.

Please read our house rules section for additional information and please do not book a room with us if you are not in 100% agreement with our rules. ;)

listing_name: 2nd Floor Poolside Apartment • Raleigh, NC
description:
Our cozy second floor apartment offers beautiful views, pool and hot tub access year round along with 2 light-filled bedrooms, its own entrance, fast WiFi and plush comfy beds.

Full kitchen with coffee bar & basics
Smart TV & Hundreds of DVD's for family movie nights.
Complimentary linens & toiletries.
Enjoy the saltwater pool and hot tub year round! Hike the nearby trails, explore breweries, museums and live music within a 10-minute drive.

Book your Raleigh getaway today. Dates fill fast!

The space
With two bedrooms, and available air mattresses, the apartment can accommodate your whole family! We typically host up to 4 adults and 2 children, and you can add 2 more by booking an optional poolside mother-in-law suite complete with a private entrance and bathroom. All bed and bath linens are provided.

We have plenty of parking, the Wi-Fi is fast, and the AC is super cool! Ceiling fans in every room keep the constant island breezes flowing all around you.

The two bedroom upstairs apartment is located next to our home, and we take Southern Hospitality very seriously! We can stock the refrigerator for you if you would like, set the hot tub to your preferred temperature, and with a little notice, even pick you up from the airport! While there is not a washer and dryer in the apartment, we do offer complimentary laundry service.

Our German Shepherds, Sadie and Luna, love to share their big fenced back yard. They love little people and playing ball. They will happily show your fur baby all the great spots to sniff, play chase and ball!

This two bedroom upstairs apartment has a well equipped kitchen with everything you need to feel right at home, including a coffee maker, tea kettle, blender, toaster, baking and grill tools and more! We are always happy to bring up anything that you might need for cooking your favorite meal!

Grill your favorite meal on the private deck with seating area and propane grill or just sit out on the deck and enjoy your cozy home away from home.

The fenced in backyard perfect for visiting puppers to enjoy with just you or if they want playmates with our girls.

Any accommodation within our power is yours. Just tell us how we can make your stay perfect! We look forward to meeting you!

Guest access
Guests are welcome to enjoy the attached private family pool and jacuzzi hot tub year round. Lounge by the pool and relax while sipping a cold beverage and soaking up some rays!!

Outdoor fire pit available for evening enjoyment of 'Smores, or just the warmth. let us know ow how we can make your stay perfect!

Other things to note
There are two bedrooms have a comfy queen and full size beds. we can also provide a twin air mattress or Pack & Play to make your stay more comfortable.

The apartment is most comfortable with up to four adults, and up to two small children. If you have more than this let us know, we may offer your group a third (separate) bedroom downstairs off the pool deck for an additional fee per night.

Quiet hours from 11:00pm until 9:00am are very important. Guests are welcome to be out on the pool deck until 11:00pm, unless other arrangements have been made.

When booking, please tell us a little about your group. What are your plans while in Raleigh? How many cars will you need to park? What are the ages of those in your group? Are there any amenities or special requests you have that could help us make sure your stay is as comfortable as possible?

We appreciate good communication. We live on property, so we are happy to assist with any needs you might have that have not already been provided in the apartment. We look forward to meeting you!

listing_name: Serene Sanctuary - Lake view!
description:
This inviting retreat is a private unit inside a home. You'll have your own private entrance and space (almost like a duplex).

It's nestled among towering trees with lake views. Enormous sliding glass doors let in natural light. Step outside onto the spacious front deck where you can breathe in the fresh air and have a drink as the sun sets over the water.

2 miles to Umstead State Park
6 miles to RDU airport
5 miles to Brier Creek's shopping & restaurants
10 miles to Research Triangle Park.

The space
This is a separate private unit within a home (almost like a duplex) . The house owner lives in the other side of the house and sometimes uses the front and back decks.

There are two dogs in the main area of the home and you may hear them from time to time.

There is one thermostat for the house and we will adjust it for you the best we can.

The kitchenette has a large microwave that doubles as a convection oven, a toaster oven and a two burner hotplate. There are pots and pans, cooking utensils, basic spices, dishes, and flatware.

A twin mattress can be set up for sleeping but host needs a 24 hour notice.

Other things to note
The driveway is quite steep. You are welcome to park at the top of the driveway on the left side of the driveway OR on the street if you'd rather not have to back down the steep driveway.

This property uses well water which is high in iron content. Water can sometimes smell like sulfur (not harmful) and creates stains in the toilet bowl and sink. The entire unit is cleaned thoroughly between each guest, but there may be well water stains on the porcelain sink and toilet bowl.

description:
Cutest. House. Ever. This newly remodeled house is 2 miles east of of downtown Raleigh and close to Wake Med Hospital and Coastal Credit Union Music Park.

You should be aware that the Airbnb is located in the heart of a bustling urban downtown neighborhood within a short distance of downtown Raleigh.

A cozy house, nestled in the pine trees sports all the conveniences of home. Enjoy a comfy bed, coffee and a fully stocked kitchen. Zip into downtown with a $5 Uber ride.

The space
This super cute 865 square-foot 2 bedroom 2 bathroom house is newly remodeled, with beautiful hardwood floors. Each bedroom has a comfortable queen-sized bed. There is a living room and modern kitchen. We provide a Keurig style coffee maker with coffee pods, sugar and cream. Kitchen is stocked with pots and pans, utensils and dishes.

Guest access
This listing has self check-in and check-out with a lock box. You will have access to the entire house and an enormous back yard. There is a gravel parking pad with room for 2 cars directly in front of the house. Parking is off street.

Other things to note
This is NOT a party house. If you have any guests on the property it must be cleared ahead of time. If there are more people than the reservation states and/or illegal activities I will call the police and you'll be evicted without a refund.

Be aware the house sits on a relatively busy street. Fortunately you cannot hear much car noise inside.

The street is not particularly walkable. One of the benefits of the location is that it sits near several major thoroughfares, making it fast and easy to get anywhere in Raleigh.

listing_name: *NEW SAUNA - Modern Retreat with Relaxing Pool
description:
Come relax in our centrally located modern escape.

This garage top apartment is drenched in natural light & includes all the extras. The open floor plan living, dining, and kitchen is perfect for couples, friends, and business travelers looking for upscale accommodations.

Our salt water lounge pool is open to guests June-Oct. NEW traditional sauna is open year-round.

Walk to the beautiful Five Points Neighborhood.

10 mins by car to downtown or NC State campus, and 20 mins to RDU airport

The space
We're adding amenities! New in 2026 - traditional Finnish sauna with adjustable lighting, movable backrests, and airplay speaker.

The nest is our retreat as well, so we stocked it full of extras.

The kitchen: touchless faucet with filtered water, coffee maker with beans (priorities!) and a grinder, kettle for heating water if you prefer tea (also stocked), all the basics, and a bar seat so you can hang out with the chef.

The bathroom: shower with bluetooth speaker shower head as well as a relaxing rain head, toilet with heated bidet seat, huge mirror and plenty of counter space.

The living room: has a midmod sofa bed with a memory foam mattress, reading material, tv with amazon fire stick (with Netflix, etc), and a blueray dvd player. We don't have cable, but feel free to login to your own streaming services as well.

The bedroom: this funky, relaxing space has a new king size memory foam mattress, a closet for your hangables, full-length mirror, blackout shades, and a ceiling fan.

The dining room: spacious table and a sliding glass door leads to the Balcony for morning coffee.

Window coverings on all windows for privacy. Most are top down, bottom up to allow sun in the top during the day.

The backyard salt water lounge pool includes in-pool lounge chairs on a tanning ledge and is just 5’ at the deepest. We also have lounge chairs on the pool deck. Perfect for relaxing. (Please note, this is a shared space and is limited to registered guests only. Guests using the pool must sign liability form in advance.)

Sauna use requires 24 hr advanced notice for us to prep & heat. The temperature ranges between 138-160F. We ask that guests do not adjust controls and please sit or lay on provided towels. (Please note, while we will give you privacy while in the sauna, the door is glass and faces the ModNest door. Sauna use is limited to registered guests only. Guests using the sauna must sign liability form in advance.)

We have one reserved parking spot to the left of the garage for a standard sized car. If you have a larger vehicle or more than one, we ask that you park on the street. There is plenty of free street parking in front of the house. Please don’t park directly across the street from the driveway.

Permit number: ZSTR-000786-2022

*Furnishings subject to change

Guest access
Full use of one bedroom, one bathroom private apartment that includes washer and dryer, balcony, and full kitchen.

The salt water lounge pool includes in-pool lounge chairs on a tanning ledge and is just 5’ at the deepest. We also have 4 lounge chairs on the pool deck. Perfect for relaxing. (Please note, this is a shared space with the owners and is limited to registered guests only. Guests using the pool must sign liability form in advance. Strict pool rules must be followed.)

The garage is roughly 50 feet from the main house, where we live. When we have guests, we try to limit backyard activity as well as garage use, but we do live in the main house, so you will likely see us and you may hear the garage door from time to time. We enjoy meeting our guests, but respect your privacy as well.

Other things to note
Please let us know if you would like to request check in prior to 3pm or check out after 11am. We'll do our best to accommodate, when possible.

ALL guests MUST be listed on the reservation. Additional visitors require advanced approval.

Spacious one bedroom suite with private entrance tucked away in a quiet neighborhood only 5 miles from Downtown Raleigh. Newly renovated with full kitchen, comfortable queen bed, cozy living area, huge bathroom with zero entry shower and screened in porch overlooking private backyard. The suite is 700 square feet, with beautiful bamboo flooring throughout. Bedroom includes a queen bed and giant walk-in closet. There is an additional double pullout couch in the living room.

listing_name: Downtown Raleigh Cottage • Walk Everywhere • Pets!
description:
A private design-forward cottage in the heart of Downtown Raleigh, just a 5-min walk to restaurants, coffee, and nightlife and 10 min on foot to the Convention Center.

Perfect for work trips or weekend escapes, the space offers fast Wi-Fi, a dedicated workspace, easy self check-in, and convenient street parking directly beside the home.

Minutes from NC State (10 min), Shaw & Peace University (5 min), and just 20 min to RTP, you’ll have walkable city energy with the comfort of a quiet retreat.

The space
Perfect for:
✓ Business & RTP travelers
✓ Convention Center visitors
✓ Visiting NC State, Shaw & Peace University families
✓ Walkable downtown getaways
✓ Remote work stays with reliable Wi-Fi
✓ Couples looking for a unique Raleigh stay

Location Highlights
• 2-Minute walk to Transfer Co Food Hall & Benchwarmer Bagels
• 2-Minute walk to Burial Brewing
• 3-Minute walk to Little Native Coffee
• 5-minute walk to Downtown Raleigh restaurants & coffee shops
• 10-minute walk to Raleigh Convention Center
• 10 minutes to NC State University
• 5 minutes to Shaw & William Peace University
• 20 minutes to Research Triangle Park (RTP)
• Easy street parking immediately adjacent to the cottage

Good to Know
• Easy self check-in for flexible arrival
• Quiet standalone space despite downtown location
• Street parking available directly beside the property
• Second bedroom is up spiral staircase in open loft
• Designed for comfort, relaxation, and longer stays


The king bed is in a bedroom with a door, and bedroom 2 is a queen bed in a private but open to living room loft space. We like to be very clear that bedroom 2 is up a very tight spiral stair that not everyone may be comfortable with. The skylight in the shower is pretty awesome, and custom local art helps really set the space off. There is a desk to work at, Roku TV, Kitchette with cooktop, fridge, microwave, sink and coffee set up. The front porch is probably a favorite of our guests, with two seating areas. Morning light is amazing in the space as well. This is a corner duplex, with two fully separate units. The Cottage faces one street and the other unit faces the side street. Traveling with a dog? We're pet-friendly with a fee upon reservation. Unannounced dogs will inquire a additional fee per our house rules.

Other things to note
Designed by the design duo (and owners) Jammy Pop!

listing_name: Cozy private dwelling in downtown Raleigh
description:
In this le petit chateau, all are welcome. This cozy and charming dwelling in downtown Raleigh offers a quaint one-bedroom/one-bathroom space with private access and a fenced-in yard to make you feel at home. Located within a quick and easy walk to downtown so you can enjoy what the city has to offer.

The space
Our petit chateau is situated in a fenced-in backyard with easy private access through the driveway gate. Clean, comfortable, and only a couple blocks from Moore Square in downtown Raleigh.

We offer a private experience where you can enjoy your stay and come and go as you please.

In the unit, you can relax on a super comfortable queen-sized Tempur-Pedic bed with a hypoallergenic cover while enjoying Netflix, Amazon TV, Disney+, or streaming service on a Roku LCD TV. A workstation/table is provided and includes WiFi internet and a blue tooth speaker. The bathroom is fitted with a large stand-up shower, and we provide all basic toiletries such as towels, a hairdryer, iron, and an ironing board. We even provide a micro-fridge and Keurig (with coffee and creamer) for your refreshments.

There is free parking on the street and the dwelling can be accessed through the main gate in the driveway. The property is secured by CPI security and a keyless door entry code which will be provided and is unique to each guest. Guests can also make use of the backyard patio at any time.

Many of your needs can be satisfied by walking a couple of blocks downtown. The neighborhood is transitional (trendy and very up and coming), with mostly single-family dwellings, brownstones, and a few apartment complexes - with a unique food hall a couple of blocks away. The downtown area has many restaurants, bars, convenience stores, and coffee shops - all within walking distance from our location. We are excited to welcome you and share our love of the city with you!

Guest access
Guests are welcomed to utilize the back yard and its amenities.

description:
Enjoy a quiet and private getaway in this guesthouse located about a mile from the center of downtown Raleigh.
You can't hear all the bustle of downtown from here, but you can be part of it in minutes.

The space
This 500 square-foot guesthouse is a private room above a detached garage behind the owner's house. It has loft ceilings, generous lighting, a comfortable queen-sized bed, couch with sitting area, and full-sized private bathroom with tub. Kitchenette with granite counter tops, sink, microwave, refrigerator and hot plate. Dishes, utensils and limited cookware provided. In-room Keurig coffee maker with coffee pods provided.

Guest access
This listing has self check-in and check-out with keypad access. You will have access to the guesthouse and by default, the garage. Your entry and exit will be through the large garage door that faces the alley.

There is a keypad on the garage door. On the opposite wall from the garage door there is a button to close the garage. Once in the garage you'll enter the door that goes upstairs to the suite. The courtyard patio and and the main house in front are not available for guest use. Please do not use the courtyard gates. There is no access to the patio for guests.

Please note that parking is in FRONT of the house (on the street) while access to the garage is from an alley BEHIND the house. Please see \Other things to note\" to find out more about parking. You will be able to drive your car behind the house to drop off or pick up your things.

listing_name: Pullen Park Guest Suite
description:
Our fully renovated 93-year-old stone house is convenient to N.C. State, the Lenovo Center, the State Fairgrounds, the State Capitol & Museums, and downtown Raleigh. The Guest Suite includes a bedroom with a queen bed, private bathroom with shower and bidet, tv room with a pub table for working or eating, and a kitchenette set up with microwave, mini-fridge, and coffee maker. The back door entrance allows you to come and go as you please.

The space
You'll have access to the secure wifi at our house and if you want to hang out on the back yard deck or grill, you are more than welcome to. For your electric car, we have a Level 2 charger on the garage.

Guest access
Take the driveway to the right of our house and “take a left” to park parallel to the windows at the back of the house. If you Uber/Lyft, just walk up the driveway and come to the back door. description:

This spacious four-bedroom/ three and a half bathroom offers a cozy environment with comfort and convenience. Enjoy ample space for relaxation and entertainment during your stay. listing_name: Modern | Gorgeous 1930s Gem | Near Brewery
description:
Located within the central Caraleigh neighborhood is Maywood Manor, a gorgeous 1930s home that has been completely updated from top to bottom.

Inside you’ll find the perfect blend of heritage features and new modern design with a gourmet kitchen, 3 beautiful bedrooms, an inviting living area, 2 lavish bathrooms and a spacious decked patio.

Stay just steps to one of the area's favorite breweries, NC State Farmers Market, Maywood music venue, and only a mile from all the excitement of downtown.

The space
Make your way inside Maywood Manor, a charming, modern home where you can live like a true local just minutes to the heart of the city.

Check yourself in and relax on the plush sofas after a day spent hiking, traversing museums or seeing the sights within the elegant living room. Here you can stream all your favorites on the wall mounted Smart TV giving you the perfect place for a cozy movie night in.

Move through into the modern chef’s kitchen that comes fully equipped with high-end appliances, a full coffee bar, and all the cookware, dinnerware and utensils you could need for your stay.

Serve up a coffee and pancakes at the sleek stone breakfast bar or a decadent dinner within the dining room with a stylish table set for eight. Don’t feel like cooking? Walk just 5 minutes to a café, 8 minutes to a brewery and only 20 minutes to Downtown.

There are three spacious bedrooms within the home with each bed topped in soft, quality linen along with plenty of space to unpack and make yourself at home.

When it comes to comfort and relaxation, the master suite has everything you could need and more with a comfortable queen bed, a smart TV and a lavish ensuite with an oversize double rain shower and a custom his and hers vanity.

Bedroom two also features a queen bed while bedroom three is perfect for kids with two twin beds. Both bedrooms share the central, sparkling bathroom with a relaxing full size bath, an overhead shower and a vanity stocked with all the essentials so you don’t have to bring a thing.

Open up the sliding glass doors on a sunny day to create a seamless indoor/outdoor space that steps out onto the elevated decked patio giving you the perfect place to have afternoon drinks with friends while overlooking the spacious, private yard.

So if you are looking for the ideal, central place to base yourself for your next vacation, work trip or special occasion, all just minutes from Downtown, restaurants, bars and coffee shops, look no further than beautiful Maywood Manor and live like a true Raleigh local.

Guest access
Guests have private access to the entire home and outdoor areas including the decked patio and grassy rear yard. You’ll also have access to free Wi-Fi, free driveway parking, complimentary coffee and access streaming apps on the smart TVs.

listing_name: Charming historic Bungalow by lake, pet friendly
description:
Welcome to our beautiful, historic river bungalow - perfect for families, small groups, or a romantic getaway! This charming retreat is a minute’s walk to Falls Dam, the Neuse River, and the Greenway, with miles of trails for you to explore.
This 1901 bungalow still maintains much of its historic charm, though it is newly renovated and stylishly furnished for the utmost comfort and enjoyment during your stay.
**We charge a separate $30 per pet/per night fee AFTER you book.

The space
The master bedroom features a beautiful king bed with new luxury linens, and a full closet. The second bedroom features a cozy queen bed and built-in bunk beds. The third bedroom has one set of built-in bunks and a desk space for any work-related needs during your stay. The whole home has been designed, furnished, and decorated by a professional home stager, with a modern, stylish, and cozy feel. Pets are welcome, but please let me know when you book which furry friends you're bringing :) We charge $30 per night per pet.

Enjoy sweet tea and conversation on the screened-in front porch, a movie night while snuggling on the comfy sectional sofa, or an endless array of outdoor activities both on the property and within a few minute's walk! The fully-stocked kitchen features all-new appliances for you to enjoy making meals and memories in. There is a new stacked washer/dryer just off the kitchen, with an iron and ironing board available for any laundry needs.

Guest access
You will have the entire bungalow to yourself.

Other things to note
Obviously this house is as charming as it could be, but we'd like to mention that for groups of 10 with mostly adults, you will be cozy together in this space for long hang out seshs. The combination of the dining and living area means there is room for everyone; we just want to ensure that your expectations of the overall size are accurate so that we still get that coveted 5 star review! :)

Pets are welcomed guests! We have 2 dogs of our own and we get it; that said we'd love to know a little about your dog once you've booked. We charge $30 per dog per night with a maximum of 2 dogs per stay. I value being flexible and accommodating so please reach out if you have any questions!

***If you're flexible on where you want to stay in the Triangle, check out our other listing in downtown Cary.***

Other things to note
Since there’s an occupied unit above you, there can be noise transfer from above and your noise might transfer, as well. It's not unusual to hear footsteps and voices. The tenants know to be courteous and respectful of you – so we ask that you please do the same. And please let me know ASAP if they are not respecting the quiet time rules. There should be no parties or any craziness above you.

Note:
This is a HOME, not a hotel. Please treat it like a home.

We have 5 children and no place to host extended family when they visit, so this home is more than a small side business for us – it’s also where our most treasured loved ones stay.

I am fastidious about cleanliness and strive to create the perfect stay for every guest – an environment of comfort and convenience that may feel hotel-like – but I do not have the staff or resources to operate like a hotel. So please be considerate. Do not hang things on the walls or move furniture without permission. And please return everything to its proper place and put toys back together correctly, ie puzzles, games, etc.

I personally work very hard to make sure your experience in our home is as comfortable and enjoyable as possible – as if you were our family too – so please, don’t take advantage of our hospitality. Just leave extra toilet paper for our next guests, and don’t take our bath towels with you. ☺

description:

The space is clean, cozy, and all yours - no upstairs or downstairs neighbors here. The neighborhood is peaceful and quiet.

The space

30 day minimum stay required (longer are welcome). This is a monthly rental only, per HOA rules and I specialize in longer stays.

description:
Experience the allure of our 1BR-1BA Cabana, nestled in a picturesque 5-acre estate merging grassland & woodland. Delight in shared luxuries like the pool, hot tub, game room, & outdoor kitchen. Nestled 100 yards from the main house, this Mediterranean-style retreat boasts impeccable finishes. We extend a warm welcome to guests who cherish and honor this serene haven. The space

The bedroom boasts a dream-worthy bed, and the private bathroom, with a sink, shower, and toilet, is impeccably clean. Nestled at the yard's end, enjoy peace and comfort in your private space with comfy chairs. Finished to a 5 star standard, this retreat is perfect for various guests. We welcome wonderful, polite, and respectful visitors seeking the delights of our estate and Raleigh. Access to the shared swimming pool, jacuzzi, and a shared game room (9AM-9PM). Guest access
MPORTANT INFORMATION: SHARED SPACES

Whether you're lounging by the poolside, unwinding in the hot tub, challenging friends to games, or preparing a delicious meal al fresco, these facilities are yours to enjoy throughout your stay. To further minimize their presence, we recommend bringing bug spray with you.
