listing_name: Famous Raleigh Mill House | Whimsical & Walkable
description:
Set behind a 1920s landmark in Five Points, the Raleigh Mill House is a 4BR/2.5BA guesthouse crafted by a local artist from rare woods and rescued architecture, including dramatic circular windows. Guests enjoy the calm, walkable area and the garden with stone paths, koi pond, and cozy fire pit. Inside, a winding staircase, custom carpentry, and a skylit primary suite create an airy, treehouse feel with Raleigh history woven throughout. The home has been featured in HBO filming and local press.

The space
~Sleeping Areas~
*Sleeping area 1: Master bedroom
*Upstairs
*King sized bed (sleeps two)
*12 Inch Memory Hybrid Plush-Individually Encased Coils-Edge Support-Quilted Foam Cover Mattress
*Walk in, cedar-lined closet
*Stand alone stall shower
*Vanity, toilet, bidet
*Lots of windows and natural light (20 windows in this room!)
*Heavy curtains close off the master bedroom for privacy

Sleeping area 2: Sunrise bedroom
*Upstairs
*Queen bed (sleeps two)
*12 Inch Memory Hybrid Plush-Individually Encased Coils-Edge Support-Quilted Foam Cover Mattress
*Full hall bathroom nearby
*Heavy curtains close the sleeping area for privacy

Sleeping area 3: Garden Bedroom & Office
*Downstairs
*Double bed (sleeps two) with memory foam mattress
*Desk and chair

Sleeping area 4: Converted Laundry room
*Upstairs
*Double bed (sleeps 2)
*Stackable washer and dryer
*Heavy curtains close the sleeping area for privacy

Sleeping area 4: Living room
*Downstairs
*Couch (sleeps one)
*Queen air mattress (sleeps two)

The Raleigh Mill House incorporates architectural features from the California Mill Valley as well as stained glass windows and trim carpentry made from rare woods. At center stage in the living room are large circular windows that once graced the towering heights of the NC State King Center and were rescued by the home's designer just as it was being demolished. The home itself is planted in the midst of what is essentially a botanical garden, with meandering stone pathways, and is set behind a historic 1920s home (Listed on the National Register of Historic Places) in the Historic Bloomsbury district of Raleigh Five points, where it's current owners and caretakers live. Features, not one, but two winding staircases and a beautiful custom handrail to match. Put the finishing touches on your work project in the office built from reclaimed wood. Or, gaze out at the stars on a cool fall night through the skylights as you lay on the king size bed in the master bedroom.

This is not your standard, run of the mill (no pun intended) short term rental. This is an opportunity to stay in one of the coolest homes in Raleigh.

Extra touches:
Bidet (stand alone)
Saloon style doors to enter the Master Bedroom
Double shower heads
Rainfall shower heads
Grass cloth wallpaper

All linens are washed thoroughly after each visit. All pillows and mattresses are encased with waterproof and bed bug proof protectors.

Guest access
Guests should park in the driveway (no street parking please). Guests can explore the yard, but please be sure to stay on the stone paths and not disturb the plants. Feel free to look into the koi pond (please do not climb on the rocks or feed the fish). Guests may use the backyard firepit area. There is no greenhouse access for guests.

Landscapers and mosquito sprayers may access the exterior of the home to do their job, but will not need to enter the home.

Other things to note
This is a very unique and whimsical home. Please be sure to read the description of the rooms to make sure this is a good fit for you.

listing_name: Historic Vibe, 2 King, Backyard Oasis, Water Table
description:
The “Delany House,” a beautifully renovated North Carolina landmark, blends historic charm with modern comforts. Just a 15-minute walk or a short drive to Downtown Raleigh’s best spots, it offers fiber Wi-Fi, smart TVs in every room, and Bluetooth speakers.

The space
We took careful detail to restore the beauty of the “Delany House”, while adding all the comforts of modern living: spacious kitchen with premium appliances and cookware, multiple smart TVs with streaming services, office space, private/fenced-in yard with grill station, al fresco dining and lounge area, and huge washer/dryer.

Pop over to one of Raleigh's neighborhood coffee shops or local hot spots — James Beard Award Winners, Ashley Christensen and Scott Crawford both have several spots nearby.

Walkable to parks and playgrounds, running/biking trails and of course, the best of Downtown Raleigh.

Our neighborhood is within immediate proximity to Downtown Raleigh’s best. It's a diverse and tight-knit community, considered the most up-and-coming in Downtown Raleigh. It’s a mishmash of all kinds of people -- young professionals, families with kids and retirees. If you're someone who's intimidated by an urban feel with the occasional gritty street corner or wayward drifter, trying another part of Raleigh might be best.

Looking to travel outside of downtown? We’re a close commute to I-40, which connects to the rest of the city and its surrounding areas, including Durham and Chapel Hill.

Parking is free, on-street, directly in front of our home. We do not offer off-street parking.

The History of our Home:
The Delany’s hosted legendary artists, musicians, dignitaries and intellects, such as jazz musicians Duke Ellington and Cab Calloway, opera great Marian Anderson, actor Paul Robeson, and activist sociologist and founder of the NAACP, W.E.B. Du Bois.

Like to golf? Guests can schedule an hour at a gold simulator lounge, .5mi from the house, on us!

Other things to note
Our neighborhood is within immediate proximity to Downtown Raleigh’s best. It's a diverse and tight-knit community, considered the most up-and-coming in Downtown Raleigh. It’s a mishmash of all kinds of people -- young adults, families with kids, and retirees. If you are uncomfortable with an urban area, then another neighborhood in Raleigh may be better for you.

NO PARTIES

NO SMOKING ANYWHERE ON THE PROPERTY

listing_name: Cozy and peaceful 2 rooms 1 bath with large yard
description:
Enjoy your stay in this UPDATED home with quick access to downtown area! NEW vinyl floors throughout, NEW bath vanity/sink, NEW lower kitchen cabinets! Open concept front room, kitchen/dining area with 58 inch tv. First bedroom has a king bed, second bedroom has 2 single beds. Enjoy the bubbling ambiance of the aquarium!

*No smoking/No vaping/No marijuana/No e-cig
*NO PARTIES. ONLY LISTED GUESTS ALLOWED WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL.
*No animals
Rule violation starts at minimum $250 fee

The space
The home sits on a half acre lot. There are two stairs to enter the home and then once inside the home is one level (no stairs). NEWLY UPDATED new flooring throughout home with no transitions. Also new lower cabinets in the kitchen with soft close drawers and cabinets.

There is a main living room, eat in kitchen area and full kitchen. The kitchen has basic cooking items (pots/pans/silverware, etc.) available for use as well as a microwave and toaster oven.

There are two bedrooms for guest use, one with a king bed and a room with two single beds. There is a tv in each bedroom as well a closet, dresser, luggage rack and chair. There is a bathroom in the hall with a tub/shower. Bed linens and towels are provided.

There is a large backyard available to relax in or to run around. Enjoy bird watching and sunsets through the trees on the walk out deck. There are lights and a patio set if you want to eat outdoors or hang out in the evening. There is a firepit/chimenea area in the back as well on a concrete pad away from the house. Neighbors are friendly and the neighborhood is generally quiet and peaceful.

The plantings on the property have been chosen due to their native pollinator friendly nature and/or as edible plants (blackberries, blueberries, etc), so enjoy the butterflies and bugs that you’ll see around the landscape! To help minimize any bugs in the house, there is regular pest control at the property. Even with our best efforts, it’s still possible depending on the weather and season that bugs (alive or dead) may be seen. They can also come in through open doors or windows, especially during the evening hours, so it helps to be mindful of minimizing open doors/leaving open if frequently going in and out.

Enjoy the ambiance of the bubbling fish tank! No need to worry with anything, the lights and feeder are on a timer, so you can just enjoy watching the fish swim. Occasionally you might even see new tiny baby fish that have been born in the tank!

At this time, there is not access to a washer dryer at the home, but there is a laundry mat nearby and laundry service in the area. Stays longer than seven days include a pickup/drop off laundry service (up to a certain amount) if desired.

The property and one room is used by the owner part time, but you will be the only ones there during your booking! The guest rooms are only utilized during a stay and throughly cleaned between bookings. Although pets are not allowed at this time, a dog and cat are periodically at the property as a note for anyone who is allergy sensitive. Please feel free to reach out with any questions!

Guest access
You will be the only ones at the property and have access to the home, yard, and the two guest rooms.

Other things to note
A cat and dog are periodically at the property (but not in the guest bedrooms) for anyone who is allergy sensitive.

No smoking/vaping/e-cigarettes/etc. allowed in this home for the respect of all guests and any sensitivities and the protection of furniture and items in the home. There is a clean up fee for any smoking in the home.

No parties or events. Please reach out with any questions.

*No smoking/No vaping/No marijuana/No e-cig
*No parties. Only listed guests allowed.

listing_name: Luxury 2 Bedroom w/ office Near RDU & RTP
description:
The single floor ranch home is well-designed for easy living and convenience. Being located just 5 minutes away from shopping centers and restaurants, as well as RDU airport and RTP, is a definite plus. Additionally the home is safe and centrally located is also reassuring.

The home is furnished comfortably and has an open floor plan without stairs or steps, making it easy to move around. The main highway runs behind the neighborhood, the noise level is minimal, so it won't be a disturbance.

The space
The ranch home is a 1 level open floor plan. Our property allows STR and Corporate rentals. We have a peaceful backyard seating, as well as the private office space with a nature view are great features that guests will surely enjoy. The dining room and living room sharing a cathedral ceiling also add to the elegance of the home.

The master bedroom with a king-sized bed, larger master bathroom with both a tub and standing shower, and a walk-in closet is impressive. The second bedroom with a queen bed and access to the guest bathroom is also convenient.

Having a Keurig Duo coffee machine in the kitchen, as well as an electric range/stove and pantry with basic cleaning supplies, will make guests feel at home. The main living space with a cozy sitting area and a laundry area with a washer and dryer is very practical for guests as well.

The garage is off-limits to guests and they can park one car in the driveway and another car on the opposite side of the street without blocking other driveways. It’s also good to know that guests don’t have access to the neighborhood amenities.
The instructions for self-check-in, as well as the property manager’s availability via the app for assistance, are helpful. The home’s location near places to eat and shop, as well as Frankie’s of Raleigh, with its fun activities, makes it an excellent choice for visitors.

Overall, the home is a great option for guests looking for a comfortable and peaceful place to stay.

Guest access
You will access to the whole house.

Other things to note
Welcome to our home! We are thrilled to have you here and we hope that you will have a wonderful stay with us.

We encourage you to explore the local area and discover all that Raleigh has to offer.
Once again, welcome to North Carolina and thank you for choosing to stay with us. We look forward to making your trip unforgettable!

Best regards,

VTJ family

listing_name: Porch & Yard, Spacious & Cozy, Close to Downtown!
description:
Welcome to our home, where you can enjoy all downtown Raleigh has to offer while having a comfortable, serene home base. You can experience the breweries, restaurants, and cafes that are a 5-minute drive away, or watch the sunset from our screened-in porch. With 4 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, and an open-concept kitchen & living room, there is plenty of room for your party to have their own space during their stay.

The space
Our home has a modern feel with a spacious layout, cozy vibe, comfortable beds and couches, and a large fenced-in backyard. Comfortable sitting areas, cozy bedrooms, stocked kitchen, office desk setup, and outdoor space make this home a great landing pad for whatever brings you to Raleigh.

THE KITCHEN

We are stocked with everything you need to cook a cozy home-cooked meal. This includes plenty of pots & pans, strainers, waffle maker, measuring cups & spoons, baking sheets, and many other accessories. There is also a comprehensive set of spices that you're welcome to use.

In addition to cookware, all your coffee and tea needs are covered, including a coffee maker, moka pot, goose-neck kettle, and coffee bean grinder.

THE LIVING AREAS

The open living room and kitchen has a 50-inch TV connected to a Roku for you to log in to all your streaming channels. You'll also find some board games and puzzles in the center console.

THE BEDROOMS

The home has four wonderful bedrooms, each equipped with a queen bed (one room has two twin sized beds), comfortable mattress and bedding, and Roku/Fire TV’s.

THE OFFICE

One of the bedrooms is also set up to be a home office. This room has an L-shaped desk, comfortable chair, and the ability to cast to a Roku TV screen for you to be productive.

In addition to the great set-up, the home is also set up on Fiber Internet so you shouldn't have to worry about a slow or poor connection.

If you have multiple workers staying in the home, the kitchen table or island is also a good place to work. On a nice day, we love working from the screened-in porch!

THE BATHROOMS

All three bathrooms have been recently remodeled:
- The primary bathroom is attached to the primary bedroom, and includes a spacious rain shower.
- The upstairs full bathroom is equipped with a bathtub.
- The half bathroom downstairs is convenient for the den and office.

When you arrive you should expect 1 toilet paper roll and 1 refilled hand soap dispenser in each of the bathrooms. Please keep these bottles in the home when you leave. Towels are provided.

THE SCREENED PORCH/YARD

One of the great parts about living in the south is taking advantage of the warm temperatures and spending time outdoors. The porch has plenty of privacy as it is within our backyard fence. It is well-lit for twilight gatherings, and usually has stellar sunset views. It opens up to our backyard which is perfect for enjoying the outdoors or letting your pet outside. We have three garden beds, which will be dormant (unless you are very ambitious and have a green thumb, in which case let’s talk!)

GRILL

We have a propane grill available for your use! While there may occasionally be leftover propane from previous guests, we kindly ask that guests provide their own propane if needed.

LAUNDRY

There is a washer and dryer located on-site for your use. We have left behind plenty of detergent for you to use. If you use your own, please ensure it is labeled high-efficiency to ensure the longevity of our washer/dryer.

PETS
We know bringing your pets with you is an important part of feeling at home, so we are delighted to host your pets. We ask that you clean up waste left in the yard, or other messes in the home. We have a large backyard for them to explore, and have left a medium-sized dog crate for your convenience.

Please note: Due to reasons outside our control (insurance) we cannot accept the following breeds: Akita, Chow, Pit Bull aka Staffordshire Terrier, Presa Canario, Rottweiler, Sharpei, and Wolf Hybrids.

ACCESSIBILITY
Entry to the home requires a walk up a short flight of stairs, or a long walk through the backyard. Additionally, entry to the bedroom levels and bathrooms requires a short walk up some steps. This home may not be the best fit for guests where this will be challenging.

QUESTIONS?

Message us!

Guest access
The home can be accessed via a key pad code. You will be provided the code at check-in.

The driveway can fit two cars. There is also free street parking.

Other things to note
There is some construction going on behind us. See Additional Photos to see the status as of April 5, 2026. Nobody has said the construction has impacted their stay.

description:
This is a 2600 sq ft. Home, in Raleighs Historic Glenwood District. Walking distance to taverns and restaurants at both five points and South Glenwood. A beautiful historic park with walking trails and special events is across the street. Downstairs has two bedrooms, one bath, as well as an additional room with a full sized futon. The upstairs is three bedrooms, one bath. Third room is smaller, often used as sleeping quarters. There are two separate entrances as well as two full kitchens.

The space
This is a beautiful historic home built in 1925. Large front porch with rocking chairs and a porch swing. We are located across from Raleigh’s Fletcher Park, which is a beautiful park, featuring Walking trails and local events held on weekends. The downstairs is very open and spacious and can sleep five comfortably. The upstairs is a very cozy living space., which also sleeps five comfortably.

listing_name: The Star at Five Points: 3 Minutes to Downtown!
description:
The best of both worlds! This townhome sits at the end of a tree-lined street of single-family homes in the desirable Five Points neighborhood of Raleigh, walkable to restaurants, shops, bars, and breweries - and minutes away from downtown and other popular spots like North Hills and Cameron Village. With free parking, in-unit laundry, WiFi, Roku, and a peaceful back porch overlooking an expansive yard, the convenience and charm of this 1950s home make it the perfect base to explore Raleigh!

The space
In a tucked-away corner of historic Five Points, relax and take in beautiful details like real hardwood floors, crown molding, and updated fixtures. Kick your feet up in the stylish and comfortable living room and look out over the quiet cul-de-sac. Make your morning coffee or prepare meals in the well-equipped kitchen. Step out of the back door onto the private porch where you're surrounded by tall trees secluding a big backyard. This is the place to call home as you discover all that Raleigh, North Carolina, has to offer!

PLEASE NOTE - The master bedroom offers a queen bed; the second bedroom is not currently furnished. Please bring your own air mattress if you plan to use the second bedroom.

Please also be aware that as this is an older townhome, the walls are on the thinner side and you may occasionally hear your the next door neighbors. They don't tend to be very noisy so this isn't typically an issue for most people.

listing_name: Spacious 2 bedroom townhouse- Pool, Greenway acces
description:
If you are looking for a short two-day to a week or mid-term rental house (1-12 months), check out our clean two-bed, 2.5-bath townhouse. We can fit up to 4 people and accept pets (with a pet fee).

The house is next to a community pool, a 2-minute walk from the greenway (perfect for dog walking and biking), and the Neuse River. It's also next to a small shopping center, a gas station, and several grocery stores nearby. Only 25 minutes from downtown Raleigh and 30 minutes from RTP!

The space
We have created a multi-use space on the first floor where you can cook, eat, play, and work with enough space for everyone to enjoy their time. We have a smart Tv that can connect to any streaming app and a notalgic video game consul and will provide hours of fun to any age!

The kitchen is fully equipped with anything you need to cook a great dinner, and you can either sit in the dining area for a family meal or at the counter with the bar stools for a quick bite.

We have added a workspace with an adjustable table, high-speed internet, and a monitor.

The second floor has a master bedroom with a king-size bed, two closets, and a full bath. The second bedroom has a trundle bed connected to and twin-size bed and a work desk, as well as a full bathroom.

In between the rooms, we have the laundry area.

The property is right next to the community pool (a few steps away- available during the summer only) and a few minutes walk from the Greenway- perfect for dog walking, running, biking, or just walking along the Neuse River.

There is access from the neighborhood to a small shopping center and a gas station. Across from them are Walgreens and a grocery store (Food Lion).

The property is about a 3-minute drive from the 540, providing easy access to anywhere in the Triangle.

Guest access
The property has a keyless lock. Details will be provided in the house instructions.

Other things to note
Please, no parties or smoking inside the house.

If you are looking for a longer stay (1 month or more), feel free to contact us.
